content: RBAC for team workspaces in Next.js SaaS 2025: two approaches — build custom with middleware + DB roles table, or use Clerk Organizations (built-in, ~zero code). Custom RBAC: define roles in DB (owner/admin/member/viewer), check in middleware and Server Components/Route Handlers/Server Actions independently. Castore pattern: roles stored per organization membership, checked at request time. For this project's scope (user-owned machines + optional team sharing), the data model is: User -> owns -> Machine, User -> belongs to -> Team, Team -> has access to -> Machine (with permission level). Better Auth has multi-tenant/organization plugin. WorkOS is enterprise-tier (SSO/SCIM) — overkill for v1.
